title: SRE Copilot Agent Metrics
description: Observability for the Autonomous SRE Agent

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT toStartOfMinute(timestamp) as time, sum(numberTagMap['gen_ai.usage.prompt_tokens']) as prompt_tokens FROM signoz_traces.signoz_index_v2 WHERE serviceName='sre-copilot-agent' AND timestamp >= $start_timestamp_nano AND timestamp <= $end_timestamp_nano GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

clickhouse_sql.name: B
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT toStartOfMinute(timestamp) as time, sum(numberTagMap['gen_ai.usage.completion_tokens']) as completion_tokens FROM signoz_traces.signoz_index_v2 WHERE serviceName='sre-copilot-agent' AND timestamp >= $start_timestamp_nano AND timestamp <= $end_timestamp_nano GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT toStartOfMinute(timestamp) as time, count() as actions_executed FROM signoz_traces.signoz_index_v2 WHERE serviceName='sre-copilot-agent' AND name='execute_tool' AND timestamp >= $start_timestamp_nano AND timestamp <= $end_timestamp_nano GROUP BY time ORDER BY time
